decisions.what: Added cron entry for Manus daily credit refresh
decisions.why: To ensure credits are regenerated automatically at 00:01 UT each day
To integrate manus functionality and verify syntax correctness

decisions.what: Pushed changes to remote master branch
decisions.why: To persist modifications and keep repository up‑to‑date
To document the API field names for future reference
To locate where manus is defined and understand its integration points

discoveries: Manus daily credit refresh is scheduled via cron at 00:01 UT
Manus appears in config/workers.yaml, config/lanes.yaml, and config/models.yaml
Manus API field names have been recorded in ~/.claude/lessons/manus-api-field-names.md
Recent dispatch credit entries are stored in ~/.claude/dispatch-credits.jsonl
The modified run.py script compiles without errors
